description_long: This airplane features a highly futuristic and angular design, with a sharply pointed nose and dramatically swept, needle-like wings that extend far from the central fuselage. The body is adorned with a mix of dark metallic blues, greens, and purples, accented by geometric patterns and glowing blue highlights, giving it a high-tech, almost alien appearance. The wings are extremely thin and taper to fine points, with no visible engines or traditional control surfaces, suggesting a design focused on speed and maneuverability. The tail section is integrated into the main body, with twin vertical stabilizers that are sharply canted outward, forming a V-tail configuration. The cockpit is positioned forward and appears to be enclosed, with a sleek, tinted canopy blending seamlessly into the fuselage. No landing gear is visible, indicating either a retracted configuration or a design not intended for conventional runway operations.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with needle-like swept wings, a V-tail, and a sleek, enclosed forward cockpit. Its surface features dark metallic hues with glowing blue accents and geometric patterns.
description_view_0: Top-down view highlighting the sharply swept, needle-like wings and the V-tail configuration, with the geometric surface patterns most visible.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the extreme thinness of the wings, the pointed nose, and the streamlined, low-profile fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers forming the V-tail and the symmetry of the wing design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, again showcasing the thin, elongated wings and the integrated tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with extremely swept, needle-like wings and pronounced anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the exterior.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a sleek, tinted canopy; likely single-seat.
